# tfe_vault_oidc_configuration

Generates a new TFE Vault OIDC Configuration.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The full address of your Vault instance.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace your JWT auth path is mounted in.
- `role_name` (String) The name of a role in your Vault JWT auth path, with permission to encrypt and decrypt with a Transit secrets engine key.

### Optional

- `auth_path` (String) The mounting path of JWT auth path of JWT auth. Defaults to "jwt".
- `encoded_cacert` (String) A base64 encoded certificate which can be used to authenticate your Vault certificate. Only needed for self-hosted Vault Enterprise instances with a self-signed certificate.
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the TFE Vault OIDC configuration belongs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the Vault OIDC configuration.
